payload.answer: Inspection request recognized for memory mem_123. No memory contents were provided in the fixture, so there is nothing to display or verify.

entity_resolution.reason: The command explicitly requests inspection of memory ID mem_123; no entity resolution beyond the provided memory identifier is needed.

details: Parsed command as a read-only inspection request.
No durable memory write, update, or deletion was performed.
No memory card was emitted because the fixture contains no underlying memory content for mem_123.

repair_options: Provide the stored contents or metadata for mem_123 to inspect it.
Confirm whether mem_123 exists if the goal is to debug a missing-memory issue.
If you intended a different command, provide the exact inspect output or target identifier.
